nasb.text: I wrote something to the church; but Diotrephes, who loves to be first among them, does not accept what we say.

esv.text: I have written something to the church, but Diotrephes, who likes to put himself first, does not acknowledge our authority.

cnv.text: 我曾經略略寫信給你那裡的教會，但他們中間那好作領袖的丟特腓不接待我們。

ccb.text: 我曾写信给你那里的教会，但喜欢做领袖的丢特腓不理会我们。

csbs.text: 我写了信给教会，但是他们中那喜欢为首的迪奥特菲不接纳我们。
